notes: v0.29.7 — Hotfix for v0.29.6 black screen after Grindare splash. Root cause: the new _make_boss_key_card_script heredoc was missing its closing block (closing triple-quote + s.source_code = src + s.reload() + return s), so the GDScript parser silently consumed source until the next heredoc opener and rejected main.gd at runtime. Game booted to splash, then black screen. Heredoc closed properly, game boots clean again. All v0.29.6 features (ship class sub-tabs / OWNED-PULSE-SURGE buckets / BUNDLES + PULSEWAVE PRO placeholders / animated boss key card / projectile + trail card fixes) are intact.
